rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to register and login.
The system shall display search results for products.
The system shall show more relevant results when searching within a specified website.
The system shall display more relevant results when filtering products by user-selected criteria.
The system shall enable users to purchase products.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allows the user to register/login to use the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 1. Register Description: Allows the user to register/login to use the system.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Displays the search result for the product.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Search Product Description: Allows the user to search for the product of their choices such as medicines, clothes and machinery. Flow of Events Basic Flow: Displays the search result for the product.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Shows more desired and user-specific results when searching in a specific website.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 3. Search Filter Description: This allows the user to specify the website on which their product has to be searched. Example: Search in Amazon. Flow of Events Basic Flow: Shows more desired and user-specific results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Shows more desired and user-specific results when filtering products based on user's choice.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Product Filter Description: Filter the product results based on user’s choice like rating, rev views, and nomber of purchases. Flow of Events Basic Flow: Shows more desired and user-specific results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enables the user to purchase the product.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 5. Get Product Description: Redirects the user to the user-selected product’s website. Then, the user can purchase the product. Flow of Events Basic Flow: Enables the user to purchase the product.
